slides.title: Balance is *a longevity skill*, and it's quietly trainable.
slides.sub: Falls end independence for many older adults. A few minutes a day can protect it.

slides.title: Falls end independence
slides.body: Falls are a leading cause of injury and *lost independence* in older age. Most of them are preventable.

slides.title: The ten-second stand
slides.body: Standing on one leg for ten seconds *is linked to* longevity in studies. It is a simple window into your balance.

slides.title: Train it every day
slides.body: Stand on one leg while brushing your teeth. Walk *heel to toe* down the hallway. Small daily reps add up.

slides.title: Strength steadies you
slides.body: Balance leans on *strong legs and ankles*. Mobility and lower-body strength make every step more sure.

slides.title: Start before you slip
slides.body: Balance declines quietly, so train it now. *A steady body* keeps your independence for the long run.

slides.title: Protect the balance that *keeps you free*.
slides.body: Vibe Health turns the movement and strength behind your balance into one calm daily plan you can actually follow.
slides.cta_text: search ‘Vibe Health’ on the App Store

caption:
Balance is a longevity skill, and most of us never train it. 🧘

The ten-second single-leg stand is linked to longevity. Practice while you brush your teeth, walk heel-to-toe, and build strong legs. 🔖

Vibe Health turns the habits behind your balance into one daily plan → link in bio.
youtube_title: The Balance Test Linked to a Longer Life
